title: CellJail
description: A plugin focused on jailing players individually.
body:
A plugin focused on jailing players individually.
## Usage
### Available commands:
**/setcell [jail] [cell]** - Saves your location as a cell on that jail.

**/jailplayer [player] [jail] [time]** - Jails a player on an empty cell on that jail on 
Adventure Gamemode.

**/releaseplayer [player]** - Releases a player into its original position and gamemode

**/jailhelp** - Shows help
